label: capability search • method • imperative summarize recall
query: summarize this long report into a few key points
notes: A strong-overlap recall floor on the methods lane: the imperative query shares head tokens (summarize / long / key points) with the seeded `summarize_document` description, so the target must clear the acceptance threshold even with two unrelated distractors in the index.
